# CWE-1289 safe: filename-only public asset lookup
lang: go
file: CWE-1289-safe.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1289 mitigated: only a final filename component is accepted.

import (
	"net/http"
	"path/filepath"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func FetchSharedAssetSafe() gin.HandlerFunc {
	root := "/srv/assets/public"
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		requested := c.Param("path")
		asset := filepath.Join(root, filepath.Base(requested))
		c.File(asset)
	}
}
